samples.gvd:
module pulse_detect
(
    input clk,
    input rst_n,
    input data_in,
    output data_out
);
endmodule
samples.xml_description:
<module id="pulse_detect">
    <description>Design a finite state machine to detect a pulse of 3 cycles.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Clock signal.</input>
        <input id="rst_n">Reset signal (active low).</input>
        <input id="data_in">1-bit input signal.</input>
        <output id="data_out">Output signal indicating the presence of pulses.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <enum id="S_IDLE">Idle state.</enum>
        <enum id="S_START">Start of a pulse.</enum>
        <enum id="S_HIGH">Middle of a pulse.</enum>
        <enum id="S_END">End of a pulse.</enum>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description>
        <reg id="state" type="sequential_logic">State register.</reg>
    </logic_description>
    <implementation>
        <case>
            <item>Reset state register and output signal when rst_n is low.</item>
            <item>Transition to S_START state when rst_n is high.</item>
            <item>Transition to S_HIGH state when data_in is high.</item>
            <item>Transition to S_END state when data_in is low.</item>
            <item>Set data_out to 1 when in S_END state.</item>
            <item>Set data_out to 0 in other states.</item>
        </case>
    </implementation>
</module>
